changeSet.author: FelixTJDietrich
changeSet.comment: Tombstone marker for an issue/pull request that no longer exists upstream, set by the RECONCILIATION deletion sweep (GitHubDeletionSweepService) and by the issues.transferred webhook. A tombstone rather than a hard DELETE because feedback.artifact_id, observation.artifact_id (NOT NULL) and activity_event.target_id reference issue rows by bare id with no FK — a hard delete orphans them silently. Keeping the row preserves those lookups; the read side excludes tombstones via "deleted_at IS NULL".

changeSet.author: FelixTJDietrich
changeSet.comment: Serves the per-repository live counts the admin sync UI renders (IssueRepository.count{Issues,PullRequests}GroupedByRepositoryIds) and the sweep's local-number listing. Partial on the tombstone predicate: tombstones are the rare case, and every read of this table that isn't the sweep itself wants only live rows.
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX ix_issue_repository_live ON issue (repository_id, issue_type) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
